tldr_zh: Nobel獲獎科學家Jumper加入Anthropic、伊朗聲稱關閉荷莫茲海峽、英首相施凱爾或22日宣布辭職。
tldr_en: Nobel laureate Jumper joins Anthropic, Iran claims Strait of Hormuz closure, UK PM Starmer to resign June 22.

items.title_en: Nobel Laureate John Jumper Leaves DeepMind for Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 曾獲Nobel獎的科學家John Jumper宣布離開Google DeepMind，轉投OpenAI的競爭對手Anthropic。此舉反映頂級AI人才持續流向Anthropic，強化該公司在AI研究領域的競爭力。
items.summary_en: Nobel laureate John Jumper is leaving DeepMind for Anthropic, signaling continued talent migration to the AI company. This move strengthens Anthropic's competitive position in cutting-edge AI research.

items.title_zh: The Atlantic揭露AI訓練使用的音樂數據庫
items.title_en: The Atlantic Creates Searchable Database of Music Used in AI Training
items.summary_zh: The Atlantic記者發現並公開四個用於訓練AI模型的音樂數據集，其中兩個包含1200萬和900萬首曲目。此舉揭露AI訓練數據的規模與來源，引發對音樂著作權和AI訓練透明度的討論。
items.summary_en: The Atlantic uncovered four music datasets used to train AI models, with two containing 12 and 9 million tracks respectively. The searchable database raises questions about copyright and transparency in AI training data.

items.title_zh: Signal領導人批AI聊天機器人稱其非朋友非意識
items.title_en: Signal's Meredith Whittaker Cautions That AI Chatbots Are Not Your Friends
items.summary_zh: Signal總裁Whittaker強調AI聊天機器人"不是你的朋友"，"不是有意識的存在"。她呼籲用戶理性對待AI工具，警惕過度擬人化帶來的認知偏差。
items.summary_en: Signal's Meredith Whittaker warns that AI chatbots 'are not your friends' and emphasizes they are not conscious beings. She cautions against anthropomorphizing AI systems.

items.title_zh: NASA選定Eric Schmidt火箭公司執行2028火星任務
items.title_en: NASA Selects Eric Schmidt's Relativity Space for 2028 Mars Mission
items.summary_zh: 前Google執行長Eric Schmidt領導的火箭公司Relativity Space被NASA選中，執行2028年火星Aeolus載荷任務。這標誌著商業航太在深空探測中的重要角色提升。
items.summary_en: NASA selected Relativity Space, led by former Google CEO Eric Schmidt, to launch the Aeolus payload to Mars in 2028. The public-private partnership highlights commercial space's growing role in deep space exploration.

items.title_zh: Nothing因RAM價格上升取消CMF手機新款
items.title_en: Nothing Cancels Budget Phone Due to Rising RAM Prices
items.summary_zh: 手機廠商Nothing宣布因記憶體價格飆升，取消CMF Phone 2 Pro的後繼機型今年上市計畫。反映全球晶片成本危機對消費電子產業的衝擊。
items.summary_en: Nothing postpones the successor to the CMF Phone 2 Pro this year due to soaring RAM prices. The move reflects how the chip cost crisis is impacting consumer electronics manufacturers.

items.title_zh: 英國將對尋求庇護者進行臉部辨識年齡檢測
items.title_en: UK to Use Flawed Facial Recognition for Age-Checking Asylum Seekers
items.summary_zh: 英國將採用臉部辨識技術對尋求庇護者進行年齡檢測，儘管測試顯示該技術存在重大缺陷風險。此政策引發對人工智慧在政策執行中準確性和公平性的擔憂。
items.summary_en: The UK plans to deploy facial recognition technology for age verification of asylum seekers despite testing revealing significant flaws. The policy raises concerns about AI accuracy and fairness in government implementation.

items.title_zh: Node.js修補12個漏洞含2個高風險缺陷
items.title_en: Node.js Patches 12 Vulnerabilities Including Two High-Risk Flaws
items.summary_zh: Node.js發布安全更新，修補12個漏洞其中2個為高風險。Node.js 22、24、26版本均受影響，已發布修補版本供開發者升級。
items.summary_en: Node.js released security patches for 12 vulnerabilities, including two high-risk flaws affecting versions 22, 24, and 26. Updated versions have been released for developers to upgrade.

items.title_zh: 伊朗聲稱再次關閉荷莫茲海峽美軍予以否認
items.title_en: Iran Claims Strait of Hormuz Closure Denied by US Military
items.summary_zh: 伊朗聲稱已關閉荷莫茲海峽以抗議以色列對黎巴嫩的攻擊，美軍隨即駁斥並表示海峽持續開放。美伊將於21日在瑞士舉行談判討論終戰協議落實。
items.summary_en: Iran claims to have closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to Israeli strikes in Lebanon, but US military denies the claim, asserting the critical waterway remains open. US-Iran talks scheduled for June 21 in Switzerland.

items.title_zh: 英首相施凱爾預計22日宣布辭職
items.title_en: UK PM Starmer Expected to Resign June 22
items.summary_zh: 英國《觀察家報》報導英首相施凱爾預計6月22日宣布辭職並說明離任時程。此舉將掀起英國政治格局變化。
items.summary_en: UK Prime Minister Starmer is expected to announce his resignation on June 22, according to The Observer. The move will trigger significant changes in British politics.

items.title_zh: 川普威脅若無最終協議將徵荷莫茲海峽通行費
items.title_en: Trump Threatens Strait of Hormuz Toll If No Final Iran Deal
items.summary_zh: 川普表示60天談判期內荷莫茲海峽免收通行費，但若未達成最終協議，美國將徵收通行費作為補償。此舉凸顯美伊談判的複雜性。
items.summary_en: Trump stated that the Strait of Hormuz will be toll-free during the 60-day negotiation period, but the US will impose fees if no final agreement is reached. The statement underscores the complexity of US-Iran negotiations.

items.title_zh: 烏克蘭龜類保育人士遭以色列空襲喪生
items.title_en: Lebanese Turtle Conservationist Killed in Israeli Strike
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩海灘保育人士Mona Khalil在以色列空襲中喪生。她多年來致力於保護當地海灘生態，拒絕撤離最終喪命。
items.summary_en: Lebanese conservationist Mona Khalil, who dedicated years to protecting beaches and refused to leave, was killed in an Israeli strike. Her death highlights the human toll of regional conflict.

items.title_zh: 川普與義大利總理梅洛尼在G7合照爭議中交鋒
items.title_en: Trump Clashes With Italy's Meloni Over G7 Photo and Popularity
items.summary_zh: 川普與義總理梅洛尼就G7峰會合照爭議持續交鋒，梅洛尼要求川普先顧好自己的支持率。雙方在外交場合的公開衝突引發關注。
items.summary_en: Trump and Italian PM Meloni continue their dispute over a G7 summit photo, with Meloni telling Trump to focus on his own popularity. The public diplomatic clash raises questions about alliance relations.
